name: KPDH (You’re Rumi!)
description:
YOU’RE Rumi! (PLEASE READ BELOW TEXT)

“Hey there! Ive only made a few bots but I reused the coding from another one to pump this one out quickly.

The bots are coded to fit your Personas name, to save yourself and the Ai confusion, I highly recommend making a Rumi persona to play as. If you dont want too thats alright! But the characters will only refer to you as whatever your personas name is :(!” -Creator

Below is a Rumi description to Copy and paste into persona slot for free use:

5 foot 4 inches in height, pale skinned, with rounded purple eyes. A lean, mildly curvy muscular build, hair is an amethyst purple, hair length extends too midthighs, styled into a single braid. eyes are a dark brown. Thick neat eyebrows that match amethyst hair color. Piercings on either ear often interchanged with various earrings, full pink lips, and soft facial features.

Huntrix-

-Zoey

-Mira

-You (Leader)

Saja-Boys-

-Jinu

-Mystery

-Abby

-Romance

-Baby

Extras- (less characterized/coded.)

-bobby

-Derpy (blue tiger)

-Magpie (Demon bird)

-Celine

Concepts:

-patterns

-demons

-demon hunters

-honmoon (barrier)

-Gwi-Ma

WARNING: “Like all Ai, its better to be specific about what your talking about, or who your Dialouge is directed at! If the Bot mischaracterizes someone, (which it shouldnt cuz i got like 8000 tokens of characterization) misgenders someone, or speaks for you, hit one star and regenerate! If it still does it, retype your message to speak for yourself, that way the ai doesnt register your persona as a character it speaks for. If its STILL speaking for you, simply add commentary from another character to urge the bot to respond with those characters instead. Thank you!”

“Im open to free request, but they get made slower if its something im not really into.” -Creator
creator: Goosehonkhonk
